crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication administratively prohibited
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:116; sid:441; rev:2; msg:"(icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication administratively prohibited"; metadata: rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication with destination host is administratively prohibited
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:116; sid:442; rev:2; msg:"(icmp4) ICMP destination unreachable communication with destination host is administratively prohibited"; metadata: rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: PROTOCOL-DNS large number of NXDOMAIN replies - possible DNS cache poisoning
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $EXTERNAL_NET 53 -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-DNS large number of NXDOMAIN replies - possible DNS cache poisoning"; flow:to_client,no_stream; byte_test:1,&,2,3; byte_test:1,&,1,3; byte_test:1,&,128,2; detection_filter:track by_src,count 1000,seconds 5; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:dns; reference:cve,2008-1447; reference:cve,2009-0233; reference:url,technet.microsoft.com/en-us/security/bulletin/MS09-008; reference:url,www.kb.cert.org/vuls/id/800113; classtype:misc-attack; sid:13948; rev:13; )
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Host Unreachable"; icode:1; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:399; rev:9; )

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks From Env Var Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows
